label: Lane Direction: Left Only
meaning: Lane 1 must turn left. Lane 2 is optional (left or straight).

label: Lane Direction: Straight
meaning: Lane 1 must go straight. Lane 2 is optional (right or straight).

label: Turn Left Only
meaning: Must turn left from this lane. No straight or right turns allowed.

label: No Turns — Straight Only
meaning: No turns from this lane. Go straight only.

label: Speed Limit Sign
meaning: Maximum speed is 65 mph under ideal conditions on this road.

label: Do Not Enter
meaning: One-way traffic is coming toward you. Do not drive into it.

label: No Passing Zone
meaning: Do not pass. Do not cross yellow lines. You cannot see far enough ahead.

label: Do Not Pass
meaning: Passing is not allowed in this zone.

label: Center Lane Only
meaning: Enter this lane only for a left turn. You must not pass in this lane.

label: Keep Right
meaning: Keep right of an object or center divider.

label: No Right Turn
meaning: Right turns are prohibited at this intersection.

label: No U-Turn
meaning: U-turns are not permitted. Do not turn around in the street or intersection.

label: No Trucks
meaning: Trucks are prohibited from using this road.

label: No Bicycles
meaning: Bicycles are not permitted on this roadway.

label: Traffic Signal Ahead
meaning: Traffic control signal ahead. Be prepared to stop.

label: Divided Highway Ends
meaning: Divided highway ends. Two-way traffic begins — stay in right lane.

label: Low Clearance
meaning: Vehicles or loads higher than the clearance shown cannot pass through the underpass.

label: Curve Ahead (Right)
meaning: Road makes a gentle curve to the right. Slow down, keep right, don't pass.

label: Divided Highway Ahead
meaning: Divided highway ahead with a center median. Keep to the right.

label: Two-Way Traffic Ahead
meaning: Drive in the right lane. Expect oncoming traffic in the left lane.

label: Added Lane / Watch for Merge
meaning: Two roadways merge ahead with a new lane added. Watch for traffic.

label: Merge
meaning: Other traffic may move into your lane. Be ready to adjust speed and lane position.

label: Right Lane Ends
meaning: Right lane ends ahead. Prepare to merge left.

label: Steep Hill Ahead
meaning: Steep grade ahead. Use a lower gear to slow your vehicle. Approach with caution.

label: Deer Crossing
meaning: Deer crossing area ahead. Watch for animals on or near the road.

label: Stop Sign Ahead
meaning: A stop sign is ahead. Be prepared to stop completely.

label: Narrow Bridge
meaning: Narrow two-lane bridge or culvert ahead. Approach with caution.

label: Pedestrian Crossing
meaning: Pedestrian crossing ahead. Slow down and prepare to stop. You must yield.

label: School Zone Sign
meaning: School zone. Slow to posted limit when yellow light is flashing. Watch for children.

label: School Crossing
meaning: School crossing ahead. Watch for children crossing the road.

label: Railroad Crossbuck
meaning: Railroad crossing ahead. Slow down, look both ways, stop if a train is coming.

label: Work Zone / Construction Sign
meaning: Orange signs mean you are in a work zone. Fines are DOUBLED when workers are present.

label: Traffic Light Colors
meaning: Green=Go. Yellow=Caution/prepare to stop. Red=Stop completely before crosswalk.

label: Pavement Lane Markings
meaning: Yellow lines = opposing traffic. White lines = same-direction traffic. Dashed = passing permitted. Solid = do not cross.
